payload.title: Introducing Waymo Premier, an elevated rider experience
payload.fact: Waymo launched Waymo Premier, an elevated rider experience for its fully autonomous ride-hailing service.
supporting_evidence: As we scale and bring our fully autonomous ride-hailing service to more people across the globe
We continue to refine the Waymo experience and deliver more for our riders

payload.title: Launching new national campaign 'Because'
payload.fact: Waymo launched a new national campaign called 'Because' to invite public conversation about the future of driving.
supporting_evidence: Today, we are launching our new national campaign, 'Because,'
We want to invite you to join a conversation about the future of driving
